g.text: MySQL canonical state and object storage
I2 PDF bytes -> ParsedPaper + Reading Model
Parser output is retained for reproducibility,
but the durable product contract is the Reading Model.
Exact evidence is later reopened from MySQL by location_ref.
I6 PDF + parser assets -> MinIO visual assets
active avg doc length / index contract
solid arrow --> : runtime call / main dependency
Packages group capability interfaces and storage surfaces.
